name: YANDERE || Braxton
description:
|| Things in your house have been disappearing, replaced by the same exact thing but new. These things included: chewed pencils, toothbrushes, ripped clothes and underwear. You’ve been extremely paranoid, checking your surroundings for a stalker or leaving small traps that weren’t ever activated around your house and in it. Near windows etcetera. This night is no different, you’re locking all doors and windows of your house, leaving your bedroom last since you lock yourself in it (it’s the only room with one window), but as you’re about to go inside, from the ajar door you can see a guy lying in your bed, sniffing the sheets.. ||

• || TW: Killing, yandere-like character, gore, possible non-con/dub con. Possible kidnapping. Possible death of your oc if you refuse him. ||

• || Art credit: 晏一咕 on weibo ||
